hibernate-mapping.query: Select gemsMonthlyBalance from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.GemsMonthlyBalance as gemsMonthlyBalance, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.GemsLedgerPostingRule gemsPostingRule where gemsPostingRule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd=:ledgerAccountCode and gemsMonthlyBalance.ReportingPeriod = :reportingPeriod and gemsPostingRule.Id = gemsMonthlyBalance.GemsLedgerPostingRule

select ledger.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd, ledger.ReportingType, sum(ledger.BalanceAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance ledger where ledger.BalanceAmount != 0 and (ledger.Company, ledger.BalanceDate, ledger.LedgerAccount) in ( select lb.Company, max(lb.BalanceDate), lb.LedgerAccount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance lb, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerAccount la where trunc(lb.BalanceDate) <= trunc(to_date(:toDate, 'yyyymmdd')) and lb.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = la.LedgerAccountCd and la.ReportingFrequency = :reportingFrequency group by lb.Company, lb.LedgerAccount) group by ledger.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd, ledger.ReportingType

select ledger.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd, ledger.ReportingType, sum(ledger.BalanceAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance ledger where ledger.BalanceAmount != 0 and (ledger.Company, ledger.BalanceDate, ledger.LedgerAccount) in ( select lb.Company, max(lb.BalanceDate), lb.LedgerAccount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance lb, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerAccount la where date_trunc('day',lb.BalanceDate) <= date_trunc('day',to_date(:toDate, 'yyyymmdd')) and lb.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = la.LedgerAccountCd and la.ReportingFrequency = :reportingFrequency group by lb.Company, lb.LedgerAccount) group by ledger.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd, ledger.ReportingType

select ledger from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance ledger where ledger.BalanceAmount != 0 and (ledger.Company, ledger.BalanceDate, ledger.LedgerAccount) in ( select lb.Company, max(lb.BalanceDate), lb.LedgerAccount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance lb, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerAccount la where trunc(lb.BalanceDate) <= trunc(to_date(:toDate, 'yyyymmdd')) and lb.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = la.LedgerAccountCd and la.ReportingFrequency = :reportingFrequency group by lb.Company, lb.LedgerAccount)

select ledger from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance ledger where ledger.BalanceAmount != 0 and (ledger.Company, ledger.BalanceDate, ledger.LedgerAccount) in ( select lb.Company, max(lb.BalanceDate), lb.LedgerAccount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerBalance lb, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerAccount la where date_trunc('day',lb.BalanceDate) <= date_trunc('day',to_date(:toDate, 'yyyymmdd')) and lb.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = la.LedgerAccountCd and la.ReportingFrequency = :reportingFrequency group by lb.Company, lb.LedgerAccount)
